/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -mtune=native -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/zip_bruteforce_tests.dir/test_charset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zip_bruteforce_tests.dir/test_password_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zip_bruteforce_tests.dir/test_archive_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zip_bruteforce_tests.dir/test_password_checker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zip_bruteforce_tests.dir/test_brute_force_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zip_bruteforce_tests.dir/test_results_storage.cpp.o -o zip_bruteforce_tests   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libzip/1.11.4_1/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libzip/1.11.4_1/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib ../libzip_bruteforce_core.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest_main.a -lpthread -lzip -lssl -lcrypto -lsqlite3 /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a
